generalData.title: General Data About Your Building
generalData.dataSourceRemark: Alle Angaben zum Gebäude wurden automatisch aus amtlichen 3D-Gebäudedaten und Topologien abgeleitet. Sie können jede Angabe prüfen und bei Bedarf anpassen.
generalData.statsRemark: These values update automatically when the building data changes

fields.buildingType: Is the building a single-family or multi-family house?
fields.numberOfFloors: How many floors (excluding basement and attic) does your building have?
fields.hasBasement: Does your building have a basement?

roof.area: How large is your roof area?
roof.constructionType: What type of roof does your building have?
roof.hasAttic: Does your building have an attic?
roof.year: When was your roof built or last renovated?

roofWindows.area: What is the total area of your roof windows?
roofWindows.windowType: What type of roof windows are installed?
roofWindows.uValue: Do you know the U-value of your roof windows?
roofWindows.year: When were your roof windows installed or last replaced?

topFloor.year: When was your top floor ceiling built or last renovated?
topFloor.area: What is the area of your top floor ceiling?
topFloor.type: What is the construction type of your top floor ceiling?
topFloor.hasInsulation: Is your top floor ceiling insulated?

outerWall.year: When was your outer wall built or last renovated?
outerWall.area: What is the total area of your outer walls?
outerWall.constructionType: What is the construction type of your outer wall?

windows.area: What is the total area of your windows?
windows.windowType: What type of windows are installed?
windows.uValue: Do you know the U-value of your windows?
windows.year: When were your windows installed or last replaced?

bottomFloor.year: When was your basement ceiling built or last renovated?
bottomFloor.hasBasement: Does your building have a basement?

constructionType.default: What is the construction type of your basement ceiling?
constructionType.heated: What is the construction type of your basement floor?
constructionType.noBasement: What is the construction type of your floor?

supply.hasGasSupply: Does your building have a gas connection?
supply.hasStorage: Can fuels such as oil or pellets be stored at your property?

heating.constructionYear: When was your heating system installed or last renovated?
heating.primaryEnergyCarrier: What energy carrier do you use for heating?
heating.heatingSystemType: What type of heating system do you use?
heating.heatingSurfaceType: How is heat distributed in the room?

electricity.title: Electricity & Renewable Energy
electricity.hasRenewableEnergy: Do you use electricity from renewable sources?
